description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The front features a prominent black awning over the entryway, with a small balcony above and a set of steps leading up to the main door. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is landscaped with a combination of tall, narrow cypress trees and broad-leaved deciduous trees, as well as manicured hedges along the driveway and entry path. The driveway is paved and leads to a parking area adjacent to the house, while the backyard is enclosed by fencing and additional greenery.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, brick and light walls, large windows, and landscaped with trees and hedges. The front features a black awning, balcony, and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Side view showing the brick wall, flat roof, and a row of tall cypress trees along the property edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black awning, balcony, main entry steps, and driveway with hedges and trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the flat roof, brick wall, and the driveway extending to the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view with a focus on the backyard, fencing, and the arrangement of trees behind the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with black awning, steps, small balcony above, and minimalistic modern styling.
